response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this role. He lacks the mandatory 5 to 10 years of C++ development on Windows, possessing only a brief 7-month stint with C/C++ nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, he does not have the required enterprise database experience (SQL Server/Oracle) or the deep domain expertise in Capital Markets and Fixed Income necessary for this position.
strengths: Extensive general software engineering experience, including CI/CD pipelines and microservices.
Proficient in several optional skills such as scripting languages, Java, and DevOps.
Brief exposure to the investment domain through work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
No evidence of Windows platform development or SQL Server/Oracle database management.
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
